introSection: Space Mountain VR (Chinese: 太空山 VR) is a steel enclosed virtual reality roller coaster located at Formosan Aboriginal Culture Village in Yuchr Shiang, Nantou County, Taiwan.
fullText:
Space Mountain VR (Chinese: 太空山 VR) is a steel enclosed virtual reality roller coaster located at Formosan Aboriginal Culture Village in Yuchr Shiang, Nantou County, Taiwan.



Black track and supports.
